title: List of email addresses for all baords
excerpt: Is there a way to get a list of email addresses for all boards?

posts.author: LegalPM (Wanda)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to get a list of email addresses for all boards?

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @LegalPM, welcome to our community!

Which email addresses are you referring to? Email addresses of a board’s subscribers?

Or email addresses that are listed in an email or text column on a board?

You can use our API to query both of these things. If you want to let me know which you’re looking for I can provide you with an example query.

Thanks~

posts.author: LegalPM (Wanda)
posts.cookedHtml: Neither. I am referring to the email address to email items to a board.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @LegalPM!

I’m afraid we currently cannot access this information using our API. As such, I’m going to move this back into our Feature Requests section.

With enough user votes we can get this functionality built for you!
